items.description: 12 oz | We blend 10% of our Premium Kona Coffee with our signature blend of other international coffees to produce a smooth, mellow, medium body coffee that you enjoy all day long.

items.name: Signature Blend | American Roast | 12 Oz
items.description: 12 oz | The least roasted of the Signature Blend coffees, resulting in a mild coffee flavor with the maximum amount of caffeine left in the bean.

items.name: Signature Blend | Breakfast Blend | 12 0z
items.description: 12 oz bag | Our medium-dark roast Breakfast Blend provides a kick of caffeine and robust, balanced flavor from beginning to end.

items.name: Signature Blend | Volcanic Roast | 12 Oz
items.description: 12 oz bag | Our deepest, darkest, boldest cup of coffee delivers velvety texture and smokiness.

items.name: Hana Bliss® Signature Blend | 12 Oz
items.description: 12 oz bag | Our most popular flavored coffee, named after the winding journey on Maui’s "Road to Hana". Deliciously rich and satisfyingly smooth blends of chocolate, vanilla and macadamia nut.

items.name: Three Waves Signature Blend | 12 Oz
items.description: 12 oz bag | A trio of tropical flavors unite like calming waves at the beach. Buttery, toasty caramel leads your senses into creamy macadamia nut with hints of toasted coconut.
